input.content:
name: artifact-cleanup-script

on:
  push:
  pull_request:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      max_age_days:
        description: Max artifact age in days
        required: false
        default: "30"
      max_total_size_bytes:
        description: Max total size in bytes
        required: false
        default: "0"
      keep_latest_per_workflow:
        description: Keep N latest per workflow
        required: false
        default: "0"
      dry_run:
        description: Dry run
        required: false
        default: "true"
  schedule:
    - cron: "0 3 * * *"

permissions:
  contents: read

env:
  PESTER_OUTPUT: Detailed

jobs:
  unit-tests:
    name: Pester unit tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Run Pester
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $r = Invoke-Pester -Path ./ArtifactCleanup.Tests.ps1 -Output Detailed -PassThru
          if ($r.FailedCount -gt 0) { throw "Pester failed: $($r.FailedCount)" }

  cleanup-plan:
    name: Generate cleanup plan
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: unit-tests
    env:
      FIXTURE_PATH: fixtures/artifacts.json
      MAX_AGE_DAYS: ${{ github.event.inputs.max_age_days || '30' }}
      MAX_TOTAL_SIZE_BYTES: ${{ github.event.inputs.max_total_size_bytes || '0' }}
      KEEP_LATEST_PER_WORKFLOW: ${{ github.event.inputs.keep_latest_per_workflow || '0' }}
      DRY_RUN: ${{ github.event.inputs.dry_run || 'true' }}
      NOW_OVERRIDE: "2026-04-17T00:00:00Z"
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Run cleanup script
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $dryRun = [bool]::Parse($env:DRY_RUN)
          ./Run-Cleanup.ps1 `
            -FixturePath $env:FIXTURE_PATH `
            -MaxAgeDays ([int]$env:MAX_AGE_DAYS) `
            -MaxTotalSizeBytes ([long]$env:MAX_TOTAL_SIZE_BYTES) `
            -KeepLatestPerWorkflow ([int]$env:KEEP_LATEST_PER_WORKFLOW) `
            -Now $env:NOW_OVERRIDE `
            -DryRun:$dryRun

name: artifact-cleanup-script

on:
  push:
  pull_request:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      max_age_days:
        description: Max artifact age in days
        required: false
        default: "30"
      max_total_size_bytes:
        description: Max total size in bytes
        required: false
        default: "0"
      keep_latest_per_workflow:
        description: Keep N latest per workflow
        required: false
        default: "0"
      dry_run:
        description: Dry run
        required: false
        default: "true"
  schedule:
    - cron: "0 3 * * *"

permissions:
  contents: read

env:
  PESTER_OUTPUT: Detailed

jobs:
  unit-tests:
    name: Pester unit tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Run Pester
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $r = Invoke-Pester -Path ./ArtifactCleanup.Tests.ps1 -Output Detailed -PassThru
          if ($r.FailedCount -gt 0) { throw "Pester failed: $($r.FailedCount)" }

  cleanup-plan:
    name: Generate cleanup plan
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: unit-tests
    env:
      FIXTURE_PATH: fixtures/artifacts.json
      MAX_AGE_DAYS: ${{ github.event.inputs.max_age_days || '30' }}
      MAX_TOTAL_SIZE_BYTES: ${{ github.event.inputs.max_total_size_bytes || '0' }}
      KEEP_LATEST_PER_WORKFLOW: ${{ github.event.inputs.keep_latest_per_workflow || '0' }}
      DRY_RUN: ${{ github.event.inputs.dry_run || 'true' }}
      NOW_OVERRIDE: "2026-04-17T00:00:00Z"
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Run cleanup script
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $dryRun = [bool]::Parse($env:DRY_RUN)
          ./Run-Cleanup.ps1 `
            -FixturePath $env:FIXTURE_PATH `
            -MaxAgeDays ([int]$env:MAX_AGE_DAYS) `
            -MaxTotalSizeBytes ([long]$env:MAX_TOTAL_SIZE_BYTES) `
            -KeepLatestPerWorkflow ([int]$env:KEEP_LATEST_PER_WORKFLOW) `
            -Now $env:NOW_OVERRIDE `
            -DryRun:$dryRun

- **ArtifactCleanup.psm1** — retention policy engine (MaxAgeDays, MaxTotalSizeBytes, KeepLatestPerWorkflow) returning a plan with summary/reasons; DryRun supported.
- **ArtifactCleanup.Tests.ps1** — 9 Pester tests (all pass), written red/green across each policy plus validation.
- **Run-Cleanup.ps1** — CLI wrapper loading JSON fixtures, emitting a deterministic `RESULT` line.
- **.github/workflows/artifact-cleanup-script.yml** — 2 jobs (unit-tests → cleanup-plan), passes actionlint.
- **Test-Harness.ps1** — runs structure/actionlint checks then `act push --rm` for 3 fixture cases, asserts exact expected `RESULT` strings and ≥2 "Job succeeded" per run. All 3 cases green; 6 job successes recorded in `act-result.txt`.
